def get_paginated_users(page: int, page_size: int) -> dict:
    offset = (page - 1) * page_size
    rows = db.query(
        "SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?",
        page_size + 1,
        offset,
    ).fetchall()
    has_next = len(rows) > page_size
    items = rows[:page_size]
    return {"has_next": has_next, "items": items, "page": page}


def list_orders(page: int, per_page: int) -> dict:
    orders = (
        session.query(Order)
        .order_by(Order.id)
        .offset((page - 1) * per_page)
        .limit(per_page + 1)
        .all()
    )
    has_next = len(orders) > per_page
    return {"has_next": has_next, "orders": orders[:per_page]}


def search_products(query: str, page: int) -> dict:
    results = db.execute(
        "SELECT * FROM products WHERE name LIKE ? ORDER BY id LIMIT 21 OFFSET ?",
        f"%{query}%",
        (page - 1) * 20,
    ).fetchall()
    has_next = len(results) > 20
    return {"has_next": has_next, "items": results[:20]}
